title: Belly of the Beast
author: Da'Shaun L. Harrison
description: A critique of anti-Black anti-fatness and its ties to social and economic exclusion.

title: The Will to Change
author: Bell Hooks
description: Bell Hooks examines patriarchy and the emotional systems that shape power and relationships.

title: Confessions of a Union Buster
author: Martin Jay Levitt
description: A first-person account of anti-union consulting tactics used against workers organizing.

title: No Shortcuts
author: Jane McAlevey
description: A practical framework for building worker power through deep organizing.
